info.title: SubVerse API reference
info.description: Detailed guide on how to use the SubVerse APIs

post.description: Directly trigger a call without workflow

options.initialMessage: Hi, ${name} how can I assist you today?
options.additionalContext: The caller is asking about a refund request submitted yesterday.

put.description: Cancels an outbound call that is still queued. Only calls whose call status is `call_in_queue` can be canceled. Removes the pending queued calls and updates call status to canceled.

400 call-not-found.summary: 400 - Call does not exist for this company

value.message: This call cannot be canceled as it is no longer in queue.

get.summary: Generate a secure, time-limited signed URL for a call recording.
get.description: Generates a secure, time-limited pre-signed URL to access a call recording. The generated link is temporary to ensure data security and prevent unauthorized access. You must provide either 'callId' or 'callRecordingUrl' in the query parameters.

parameters.name: callRecordingUrl
parameters.description: A direct S3/Storage URL to a call recording.

value.message: Validation error: Either callId or callRecordingUrl is required
No call record found, Please contact administrator.

post.description: Trigger a call in the workflow

options.initialMessage: Hi, ${name} how can I assist you today?
options.additionalContext: The caller is asking about a refund request submitted yesterday.

put.description: Edit details of the call still in queue

options.initialMessage: Hi, ${name} how can I assist you today?
options.additionalContext: The caller is asking about a refund request submitted yesterday.

value.message: User call already placed, not found in queue

delete.description: Delete call request from the call queue

customer_number.description: User's phone number. Must be a valid phone number with country code, with or without '+' prefix.

value.message: User call already placed, not found in queue

get.description: Retrieves all available agent blueprints and their default version configurations along with workflow mappings. This endpoint provides comprehensive information about voice agents including their full configuration, version details, and which workflows they are associated with.

initialMessage.messageContent: Hello! I'm your virtual assistant. How can I help you today?

systemContext.system: You are a helpful customer service agent for a telecommunications company.

401.description: Unauthorized - API key is missing or invalid

phoneNumber.description: User's phone number. Must be a valid phone number with country code, with or without '+' prefix.

agentName.description: Agent to be used for the call, find it in Agents sections in dashboard.

metadata.description: Customer's details to be used in the call, use them in agent initial and system prompt as ${variable_name} format. These will be replaced by actual value of the variables.

channel.description: Channel to be used for the call (SIP Outbound). If provided, number will be randomly picked from the configured channel.

agentNumber.description: Agent phone number used to place call. Default value will be any number set in communication channel section (SIP Outbound). Must be a valid phone number with country code, with or without '+' prefix.

options.description: Default values as defined in the Agents section in dashboard. Use this if you want to override those options. E.g. if you want to change the language, voice, initial prompt, etc.

noOfRetries.description: Number of retries if call failed if provided

retryAfterHours.description: Retry at interval (in hrs) if provided

startWorkingHour.description: 24 hour format (HH:MM). If provided call made before start hours will rescheduled at start hour of the day.

endWorkingHour.description: 24 hour format (HH:MM). If provided call made after end hours will rescheduled at start hour of next day.

timezone.description: Call between start working hour and end working hour in timezone if provided [Default: Asia/Kolkata]

callPriority.description: Defines the urgency of the call on a scale of 1 to 100, where 1 is the highest priority and 100 is the lowest. Default is 10.

callOnDate.description: The date by which the call must be placed. If the call is not made on same day, it is marked as expired and will not trigger. Any valid date format is Any valid date format is “YYYY-MM-DD”.

scheduleTime.description: Schedule customer's call at a specific future time. Follow ISO date format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ).

customer_number.description: User's phone number. Must be a valid phone number with country code, with or without '+' prefix.

customer_details.description: User's details to be used in the call, use them in agent initial and system prompt as ${variable_name} format. These will be replaced by actual value of the variables.

use_case.description: Agent to be used for the call, find it in Agents sections in dashboard. Default value: agent selected in the workflow.

bot_number.description: Voice agent phone number used to place call. Must be a valid phone number with country code, with or without '+' prefix. Default value: bot number selected in the workflow.

schedule_time.description: Schedule customer's call at a specific future time. Follow ISO date format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ). Default value: current time, to trigger the call immediately.

options.description: Default values as defined in the Agents section in dashboard. Use this if you want to override those options. E.g. if you want to change the language, voice, initial prompt, etc.

no_of_retries.description: Number of retries if call failed if provided

retry_after_in_hrs.description: Retry at interval (in hrs) if provided

start_working_hour.description: 24 hour format (HH:MM). If provided call made before start hours will rescheduled at start hour of the day.

end_working_hour.description: 24 hour format (HH:MM). If provided call made after end hours will rescheduled at start hour of next day.

timezone.description: Call between start working hour and end working hour in timezone if provided [Default: Asia/Kolkata]

call_priority.description: Defines the urgency of the call on a scale of 1 to 100, where 1 is the highest priority and 100 is the lowest. Default is 10.

call_on_date.description: The date by which the call must be placed. If the call is not made on same day, it is marked as expired and will not trigger. Any valid date format is “YYYY-MM-DD”

transcriptLanguage.description: The language used to capture and understand what the user says.

ttsLanguage.description: Default language of the voice agent used to speak with the user.

voiceId.description:
The specific voice if that the voice agent will use. You can also provide custom voice id other than the ones mentioned here. Recommended list of Indian voices below: 
 M LEO ENG - 'TNHbwIMY5QmLqZdvjhNn'
 F MONIKA ENG - '2zRM7PkgwBPiau2jvVXc'
 F RIYA ENG - 'vYENaCJHl4vFKNDYPr8y'
 M LEO BOTH - 'IvLWq57RKibBrqZGpQrC'
 F MONIKA BOTH - '1qEiC6qsybMkmnNdVMbK'
 F RIYA BOTH - 'mActWQg9kibLro6Z2ouY'
enum: mention any other custom voice id

initialMessage.description: The initial greetings message. The dynamic variables (e.g. ${name}) will be replaced by actual value provided in customer_details or metadata.

additionalContext.description: Extra context provided to the voice agent (e.g. details that are unique to the target customer category, which is not mentioned in the system prompt). The dynamic variables (e.g. ${name}) will be replaced by actual value provided in customer_details or metadata.

allowedOverallInterruptions.description: Whether the voice agent should stop speaking upon user interruption during the entire conversation.

allowedInterruptionsInitially.description: Whether the voice agent should stop speaking upon user interruption while initial greetings message is playing.

speed.description: How fast or slow the voice agent should talk.

transferNumber.description: Human agent's phone number to transfer the call in case of escalations. Must be a valid phone number with country code, with or without '+' prefix.

communicationMethod.description: Whether the communication is two-way (inetractive conversation) or one-way (speak only the initial prompt and hang up).

dtmfEnabled.description: Whether the user can press buttons on their phone (like 'Press 1 for support') to interact with the agent.

responseCode.description: Always returns 200 value, with error or success response details in message.

message.description: Success or error message with description.

oneOf.description: Specific version number of the agent (e.g., 1, 2).
Version tag: 'default' uses the currently published version, 'draft' uses the latest saved draft.

AgentVersion.description: Determines which version of the agent to use for the call. Defaults to "default".

responseCode.description: HTTP status code indicating the result of the request.

message.description: Human-readable message describing the result of the request.

agents.description: Array of agent configurations and metadata.

workflowList.description: Array of workflow-to-agent mappings showing which workflows use which agents.

agentId.description: The human-readable unique identifier for the agent.

config.description: Complete configuration object for the agent including LLM, STT, TTS services, instructions, and operational settings.

llmService.description: Language model service configuration for the agent.

sttService.description: Speech-to-text service configuration for understanding user speech.

model.description: The specific STT model to use.

smartFormat.description: Whether to enable smart formatting of numbers, dates, etc.

numerals.description: Whether to convert numerals to words.

keywords.description: Array of keywords to boost in speech recognition.

ttsService.description: Text-to-speech service configuration for the agent's voice.

model.description: The specific TTS model to use.

voiceName.description: Name of the voice to use.

customVoiceId.description: Custom voice ID if using a trained voice.

agentInstructions.description: Instructions and prompts that define the agent's behavior and personality.

initialMessage.description: The initial message the agent will say.

messageContent.description: The content of the initial message.
messageContent.example: Hello, I am calling from Testing. How can I help you today?

systemContext.description: Array of system context messages defining agent behavior.

system.example: You are a helpful customer support agent.

conversationalFlow.description: Visual flow configuration for the agent's conversation logic.

transferTo.description: Phone number to transfer calls to.

backgroundAmbient.description: Whether background ambient sound is enabled.

backgroundThinking.description: Whether background thinking sound is enabled.

falseInterruptionTimer.description: Timer for false interruption detection in seconds.

preemptiveGeneration.description: Whether preemptive response generation is enabled.

silenceTurns.description: Number of silent turns before action.

knowledgeBaseId.description: ID of the knowledge base to use.

interruptionInitial.description: Whether interruption is enabled for initial message.

fillerWords.description: Array of filler words for backchannel.

addToContext.description: Whether backchannel is added to context.

description.example: Summary of discussion between agent and customer.

agentsList.description: List of agent transfer configurations for this agent.

useBaseSettings.description: Whether to use base settings for transfer.

agentVersion.description: Version of the agent to transfer to.

dynamicVariablesConfig.description: Configuration for dynamic variables that can be used in agent prompts.

name.description: Human-readable name for this version of the agent.

description.description: Detailed description of this version's purpose or changes.

number.description: Version number for this agent configuration.

agentId.description: ID of the agent assigned to this workflow.

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Authentication header containing API key from SubVerse dashboard.
